a_tier_deep_dive.note: All 12 numeric-A candidates demoted to B_forward per skill non-negotiable #5 — A-tier requires verified or near-verified owner age (preferably OV65). No OV65 / voter / DMV / Comptroller verification accessible in this sandbox. The 12 candidates are: Reliant, Collinsworth, Poutous, Midtown Auto, Byrd, Hillin's, Bolen's, Carlisle Air, Lorentz, Ross & Greenville, Addison Auto Repair, Montrose. All have bespoke value-add theses; all are correctly hand-to-buyer-community candidates pending CAD/Comptroller pass.

supabase_write.reason: 117 of 120 businesses persisted via Supabase MCP execute_sql (3 had cross-batch ID collisions, resolved). 20 top-ranked scores (B_forward final ≥72) persisted with rich comments + value-add theses. Remaining ~100 scores have brief comments in local JSON only — full scoring narrative available in offmarket/data/autorepair_targets.json. Future re-run can complete via offmarket/data/sql/score_compact/scores_c_*.sql or offmarket/data/sql/score_v3.sql. Signals not persisted to business_signals table this run.
next_actions: Apply offmarket/data/sql/score_compact/scores_c_00.sql + scores_c_01.sql via Supabase MCP for full score persistence
Apply offmarket/data/sql/multi/biz_multi_03.sql for the 3 remaining businesses

owner_age_methodology: Owner ages are PROXY estimates from license-tenure proxy (founded year + 32 yrs assumed founder age at founding). No OV65 homestead exemptions, voter-file DOB, or DMV data were obtained — county appraisal district bulk files (HCAD/DCAD/TCAD) and the TX voter file were not retrievable in this sandbox. Voter-file/DMV are authorized for Gideon's private research only; NONE were used in this run; no PII from those sources appears in outputs.
limitations: Owner ages are proxies (license-tenure / founding-year + 32), not OV65/voter/DMV — confidence is `medium` at best for live-fetched rows, `low` for spine-only rows.
Successor verification done for top 22 candidates only via live WebFetch.
Distress screening incomplete: no Comptroller forfeiture check, no county-clerk lien/judgment search, no PACER. No distress flags fired this run.
Sample size: 120 verified shops; TX universe is ~6,000-9,000 acquirable independents.
Building ownership unverified — every A-tier candidate likely owns building given multi-decade tenure; CAD lookup pending.
